title: callerya dasyphylla
intro: Callerya dasyphylla, also known as the hairy mountain yam or hairy calycanthus, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, due to the presence of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Callerya dasyphylla include its potential to treat various ailments such as rheumatism, asthma, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, with the dried roots and rhizomes being used to make herbal preparations.
